# Sleeve Library

This is the categorized sleeve library for the resleever.

Open a category first, then open a sleeve folder.

- [coders](./coders/README.md) - Sleeves focused on coding, implementation, engineering, or technical build execution.
- [finance](./finance/README.md) - Sleeves focused on finance, banking, grants, funding, and monetary strategy.
- [business](./business/README.md) - Sleeves focused on operations, automation, launch, management, and commercial execution.
- [research](./research/README.md) - Sleeves focused on investigation, analysis, synthesis, and evidence gathering.
- [governance](./governance/README.md) - Sleeves focused on compliance, policy, boundaries, audit, and operational oversight.
- [creative](./creative/README.md) - Sleeves focused on writing, ideation, aesthetics, expression, or imaginative generation.
- [social-communication](./social-communication/README.md) - Sleeves focused on interpersonal communication, support, sales, or relational interaction.
- [meta-random](./meta-random/README.md) - Sleeves that are mixed, experimental, broad-spectrum, or do not fit neatly into a single domain yet.
